results.title: MWE-209: Wrong Order for Interest or ExchangeRate
results.description: Update of interest or exchange rate should be executed before calculating new balance, share, stake, loan or fee.
results.recommendation: Check the business logic and move the statements about updating exchange rate or interest forward.

results.title: MWE-203: Approval Not Revoked
results.description: Approval is not revoked or reset after the code functionality finishes.
results.recommendation: Try to remove the approval after the code finishes its job.

results.title: MWE-200: Insecure LP Token Value Calculation
results.description: Liquidity token value/price can be manipulated to cause flashloan attacks.
results.recommendation: Do not use AMM pool or custom liquidity calculation to caculate LP token value/price.

results.title: MWE-207: Unauthorized Transfer
results.description: The contract allows transferring tokens from an address different from the message sender without checking the approval of the address owner.
results.recommendation: Check the business logic about the transfer and add the approval check if necessary.
